hero.title: ChatBordage
hero.description: Embark as a formidable feline captain! Recruit your crew, loot kibble reserves, and become the ocean's most feared pirate in this boarding board game.

sections.whichCat: WHICH PIRATE CAT WILL YOU BE?

gameType.title: GAME TYPE
gameType.description: A hidden role card game mixing strategy, luck, and social interaction!

mechanics.title: MECHANICS
mechanics.description: Bluff, collect coins, and avoid mutinies.

brief.tagline: A hidden-role card game blending strategy, luck, and social interaction in a world of pirate cats.

concept.p1: In CHATBORDAGE, each player embodies a ship visible to all, with its own stats (HP and Damage) and a unique power.
concept.p2: Meanwhile, you pursue a secret mission known only to you, checked on the app at the start of the game.
concept.p3: One exception: the Captain role is public and revealed aloud! Will you protect them, or try to sink them?

catSlides.intro:
15 ships with unique abilities:
Take the hits with The Frigate, manipulate the deck with The Junk, or hide your identity with the Ghost Ship
catSlides.frigate: A robust escort ship ideal for bold cats who like to lead the charge.
catSlides.junk: Agile and sneaky, it allows you to manipulate the deck cards to steal opponent kibble.
catSlides.ghostShip: Perfect for hidden roles, it sows doubt in the crew's minds until the fatal blow.

resources.title: Manage your resources:
resources.text: Each turn, choose to draw 2 cards or gain 2 coins. Equip yourself with permanent cards, but watch out, they can be stolen or destroyed!

attacks.title: Anticipate your attacks:
attacks.text: You can play as many cards as you want, but be careful: playing an Attack card ends your turn immediately!

noMercy.title: No quarter:
noMercy.text: Players start with 5 HP (6 for the Captain). At 0 HP, elimination is permanent and the assassin recovers all the victim's coins and cards.

digital.app: The central app manages randomness and secrets for a smooth experience
digital.events: Sea Events: Each turn, a random event applies to all (storm, fog, treasure island)
digital.shop: The Shop: Spend your coins to buy powerful and unique bonuses (like revealing a player's role, healing, or getting +2 damage on an attack). Once bought, the item disappears for everyone!

form.lead: Pre-register now to stay in the loop!
form.success: Thanks! Your pre-registration has been recorded.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

unlock.title: Restricted Access
unlock.desc: Please enter the secret code found in your ChatBordage game box to unlock the companion app.
unlock.error: Invalid code, matey! Look closely at the bottom of your game box.

reveal.noPeeking: Make sure no one is looking!
reveal.publicRoleNote:
⚓ Your role is known to all — announce it out loud!
You do not receive a secret mission.
reveal.replaceTablet: Place the tablet back in the center

resources.title: Resource Phase
resources.desc: Player {num}, it's your turn! Choose your bonus:

bonusDraw.title: Bonus Draw!
bonusDraw.message: You draw {amount} physical cards this turn thanks to your bonuses.

failedAttack.title: Attack Failed
failedAttack.message: The attack failed due to the fog!

revive.title: Revive
revive.message: {name} comes back to life with 1 HP!

rulesPage.title: 📜 The Pirate Code (Rules)
rulesPage.rule1Text: Here you can write all the rules of Chatbordage...

galion.name: The Galleon
galion.ability: Maximum hand size increased to 6 cards.

fantome.name: The Ghost Ship
fantome.ability: Your role can never be revealed by the enemy.

caravelle.name: The Caravelle
caravelle.ability: Draw 1 additional free card each turn.

sloop.name: The Sloop
sloop.ability: Exchange a card from your hand with a random card from the deck (1x/turn).

brick.name: The Brig
brick.ability: When you are attacked, draw 1 card.

jonque.name: The Junk
jonque.ability: Look at the top card of the deck; keep it or put it back on the bottom (1x/turn).

troismats.name: The Three-Masted Ship
troismats.ability: Your Equipment cards cannot be destroyed.

felouque.name: The Felucca
felouque.ability: If you attack a player with more HP than you, +1 bonus damage.

cotre.name: The Cutter
cotre.ability: Steal 1 random card from an opponent's hand (1x/game).

brigantin.name: The Brigantine
brigantin.ability: When you eliminate a player, draw 2 bonus cards.

clipper.name: The Clipper
clipper.ability: If you haven't played any Attack cards this turn, gain 1 bonus coin (1x/turn).

gabare.name: The Lighter
gabare.ability: Gain 1 additional coin whenever you choose the coins option.

capitaine.name: The Captain
capitaine.mission: Survive and ensure that only himself and his Protector (whom he does not know!) remain at the end. +1 starting HP.

protecteur.name: The Protector
protecteur.mission: Keep the Captain alive until the end of the game. If the Captain survives and the Protector is alive, both win together!
protecteur.desc: Keep the Captain alive until the end.

chasseur.name: The Bounty Hunter
chasseur.mission: Be the first to sink 2 enemy ships. Once done, he wins immediately, no matter what happens next.
chasseur.desc: Sink (eliminate) 2 enemy ships before anyone else.

renegat.name: The Renegade
renegat.mission: Teams up with no one. Must be the absolute last survivor: all other players, without exception, must be eliminated.
renegat.desc: Be the last survivor (see the elimination of all others).

contrebandier.name: The Smuggler
contrebandier.mission: Wins as soon as he has 15 coins, at any point in the game. Better to keep an eye on your savings than your damage.

shop.intro: Bring the adventure home: the game, goodies, and the collector's edition for true sea dogs.
shop.shippingNote: Orders will be shipped as soon as the game is officially released.

home.secretRolesDesc: At the start of the game, everyone receives a secret mission. Only the Captain's role is revealed to all. Will you guess who is plotting against whom?
home.rolesCtaStart: All missions, detailed conditions and powers: see the

welcome.title: Welcome aboard!
welcome.lead: In ChatBordage, each player commands a ship of feline pirates. But beware: under your sailor card hides a secret. A mission that only you know.

goal.title: Goal of the Game
goal.p1: Each player has a different secret mission (except the Captain, whose role is known to everyone). The game ends as soon as a player completes their mission. The possible missions are detailed below.
goal.tip: First game tip: play once 'cards on the table', revealing everyone's roles out loud, just to understand the flow. The real game, with the secret, will be even better afterwards!

setup.title: Setup
setup.item1: Each player is assigned (or draws at random) a ship via the app, visible to everyone on the screen.
setup.item2: Everyone checks their secret role on the app, hidden from others. The Captain is announced out loud: everyone must know who they are.
setup.item3: Each player takes 5 hit points. The Captain starts with 6 HP because they are more exposed.
setup.item4: Each player receives a starting hand of 3 cards, drawn from the well-shuffled playing deck.
setup.item5: The Captain starts the game. The turn then passes to the next player clockwise.

tour.title: Turn Sequence
tour.p1: On their turn, each player always follows the same 4 steps, in this order:
tour.step1Desc: The app announces an event that applies to everyone during this turn: a storm, a thick fog, a lucky break... Everyone suffers (or benefits from) this event in the same way, unless otherwise specified.
tour.step2Title: Step 2 — Cards or Coins, your choice
tour.step2Desc: The player whose turn it is chooses only one of the two options: draw 2 cards, OR gain 2 coins. Impossible to do both! A hand can never exceed 5 cards — if a special card makes you gain more, you must discard down to 5 at the end of your turn.
tour.step3Desc: You can play as many cards as you want, in the order you want, and target any other player around the table. But as soon as you play an Boarding (attack) card, your turn ends immediately, even if you have cards left in your hand. Think carefully about the order in which you play your cards!
tour.step4Desc: Once per turn, you can activate your ship's special power (some powers are automatic and do not need activation, check your ship's sheet on the app).
tour.tip: When a player attacks you, you are not totally helpless! You have the right to play a Sails card immediately after to defend yourself, before damage is calculated. Always keep a defense card handy if you can.

elimination.title: Hit Points & Elimination
elimination.item1: Each player starts with 5 hit points (6 for the Captain).
elimination.item2: When a player drops to 0 HP, they are eliminated: they no longer play until the end of the game.
elimination.item3: All cards in hand and all coins of the eliminated player are given to the player who eliminated them.
elimination.item4: If a card affects multiple players at once (like a Spread Shot) and eliminates two at the same time, the attacker collects the cards and coins of both.

roles.title: Secret Roles
roles.p1: At the very beginning of the game, each player discovers their mission through the cards. No one must know the other players' roles (except the Captain's, announced to everyone). One simple rule: roles do not grant any special powers, only a secret goal to reach. All powers in the game come from the ships.
roles.tip: If several missions seem to be completed 'at the same time', it is almost never really the case: each card or action is resolved one by one. The very first mission accomplished, in the actual order of actions, ends the game.

ships.title: The Ships
ships.p1: Visible to all, your ship displays your starting hit points, your base attack damage, and your special power. Choose one that fits your play style: cautious, aggressive, or cunning!
ships.p2: For more challenge and fun, draw your ship at random.

precisions.title: Useful Clarifications
precisions.item1: You can voluntarily discard a card you do not want to keep at any point during your turn.
precisions.item2: If your hand exceeds 5 cards at the end of a turn (for example after a Contraband Chest), you discard the excess to go back down to 5.
precisions.item3: If the draw pile is ever depleted, we simply mix the discard pile to make a new draw pile.
precisions.item4: If a player has to leave the game mid-way, they are treated as eliminated: their cards and coins go to the player sitting on their left.
precisions.item5: Techniquement, nothing stops you from playing a card on yourself (for example a Sabotage on your own Treasure), but it's rarely of any use!

content.title: Box Contents
content.item3: The ChatBordage companion app (ships, secret roles, sea events, shop)

tempete.name: Storm!
tempete.desc: The sea goes wild. Attacks inflict +1 Damage this turn.

brume.name: Thick fog
brume.desc: Impossible to aim straight. Attacks have a 50% chance of failing this turn.

tresor.name: Treasure island
tresor.desc: An island full of riches! Each player draws 1 additional card this turn.

calme.name: Calm sea
calme.desc: A calm day at sea. No special effects.

jeu.name: ChatBordage — The game
jeu.shortDesc: The hidden-role card game in a world of pirate cats. 4 to 6 players, ~30 minutes.

longDesc.0: Each player commands a feline pirate ship, with its own stats and a unique power. But under your sailor card hides a secret mission that only you know...
longDesc.1: Bluff, accusations, betrayals: ChatBordage blends strategy, luck, and social interaction in an original world of pirate cats. The game ends as soon as a player completes their hidden mission — will you guess who is plotting against whom?
longDesc.2: The game is accompanied by a companion app that manages secret roles, sea events, ship assignments, and the in-game shop.

stickers.name: Pack of 5 stickers
stickers.shortDesc: The 5 pirate cats as waterproof vinyl stickers.

features.1: Chat-rles Henri, Miranda, Kim, Sylas, Maskey

longDesc.0: Show off your favorite crew! This pack brings together the 5 star cats of the game: Chat-rles Henri the Captain, Miranda the Protector, Kim the Bounty Hunter, Sylas the Renegade, and Maskey the Smuggler.
longDesc.1: Waterproof die-cut vinyl: decorate your bowl, computer, water bottle, or rum barrel. Resistant to water, sun, and friendly boardings.

longDesc.0: Ideal for sipping your coffee before sinking your friends. Captain Chat-rles Henri in all his glory, printed in high definition on white ceramic.
longDesc.1: Capacity 33 cl, dishwasher and microwave safe (at your own risk for the effigy).

collector.name: Collector's Edition
collector.shortDesc: The game box, 5 stickers, the mug and a set of exclusive gold cards.

features.3: Set of 15 exclusive gold Ship cards

longDesc.0: The ultimate edition for true sea dogs. You receive everything: the base game, the stickers, the Captain mug, plus an exclusive set of Ship cards with hot foil finish (the 15 ships in premium, foiled versions, not available individually).
longDesc.1: Presented in a wooden chest screen-printed with a cat paw, with a hand-numbered certificate of authenticity. Limited edition of 500 copies.

editor.title: Website Publisher
editor.content: This website is a product developed by students from BUT MMI Castres and Troyes as part of their academic training.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.content: The site is hosted by Notabl.fr.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All elements of this site (texts, illustrations, logos, etc.) are the exclusive property of the ChatBordage project or their respective authors, unless stated otherwise. Any reproduction is prohibited without prior authorization.

privacy.title: Personal Data and Cookies
privacy.content: In accordance with personal data protection regulations, information collected via the pre-registration form is used exclusively for this project and will never be sold or transferred to third parties.

purpose.title: 1. Purpose
purpose.content: These Terms and Conditions of Sale (TCS) govern the contractual relationship between the ChatBordage student project and any person making a pre-order or purchase on the site.

validation.title: 2. Order Validation
validation.content: Any pre-order placed on the site constitutes full and complete acceptance of these terms. As part of this student project, orders are simulated for educational purposes (no orders will be shipped).

prices.title: 3. Prices and Payment
prices.content: Prices displayed in the shop are indicated in Euros (€) including all taxes (VAT). Accepted payment methods are indicated during checkout.

delivery.title: 4. Delivery
delivery.content: As part of this mock educational project, no orders will be shipped and no products will be delivered to the specified address.

withdrawal.title: 5. Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.content: In accordance with current legislation, you have a 14-day right of withdrawal starting from the receipt of your products.
